name: /promote-standard preview reports zero matches when the section detector fires nowhere in the tree
command:
mkdir -p standards/snapshots tree && printf 'sections:
  5.2.4: {detector: "grep -lE eval"}
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && printf 'no matches here
' > tree/x.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 5.2.4 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --root tree --preview-only 2>out.txt && grep -q 'files_flagged=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
